label: Wait
description: Pause workflow execution for a specified duration. Short waits (< 30 s) sleep in-process; long waits store state and schedule a resume.

settings.name: duration
settings.label: Duration
settings.description: How long to wait. Paired with unit.

ai.shortDescription: Pause execution for a fixed duration.
ai.whenToUse: When you need a delay between steps — e.g. rate-limiting, polling back-off, or waiting for an async operation to settle.
ai.examplePrompt: wait 30 seconds before the next step
ai.promptHints: Short waits (< 30 s) sleep in-process. Long waits pause the workflow and resume via scheduler. Pass-through: downstream nodes see the same input.
